messages.content: Review the gathered public evidence for react-router and propose evidence-backed KB updates only. Public evidence summary: weekly npm downloads about 53.8M for 2026-04-16..2026-04-22; published OSV/GHSA records for GHSA-cpj6-fhp6-mr6j (CVE-2025-43865, prerelease/7.x through 7.5.1, fixed 7.5.2, framework-mode prerender-data spoofing/cache poisoning), GHSA-f46r-rw29-r322 (CVE-2025-43864, 7.2.0-7.5.1, fixed 7.5.2, framework-mode SPA-mode header cache-poisoning DoS), GHSA-3cgp-3xvw-98x8 (CVE-2025-59057, 7.0.0-7.8.2, fixed 7.9.0, meta()/Meta script:ld+json SSR XSS in Framework Mode only), GHSA-9jcx-v3wj-wh4m (CVE-2025-68470, 6.0.0-6.30.1 and 7.0.0-7.9.5, fixed 6.30.2/7.9.6, unexpected external redirect via untrusted paths), GHSA-2w69-qvjg-hvjx (CVE-2026-22029, 7.0.0-7.11.0, fixed 7.12.0, open redirects leading to XSS via unsafe URLs in Framework/Data/unstable RSC modes, not Declarative mode), GHSA-8v8x-cx79-35w7 (CVE-2026-21884, 7.0.0-7.11.0, fixed 7.12.0, ScrollRestoration SSR XSS in Framework Mode only), GHSA-h5cw-625j-3rxh (CVE-2026-22030, 7.0.0-7.11.0, fixed 7.12.0, CSRF on document POST requests to UI routes in Framework Mode / unstable RSC, not Declarative/Data). Use drafting-aid style bullets for a KB page and index blurb.
